raw_consumer_statement: I stayed in a hotel from XXXX. I was charged {$320.00}, which I paid. Some other company charged me {$540.00} for the same 3 days at the same hotel. I received a copy of my correct bill from the hotel signed by the manager stating that my bill was {$320.00}. I mailed all this to Citibank. They said they sent me a letter that I was supposed to sign and date and send back. I NEVER received any letter. I called up and they said they were sending me another letter. NEVER received that one either. I just called up and was told that the date now was too late and I was out of luck. I have never disputed anything before. I am a XXXX XXXXXXXX on a fixed income and this is a lot of money to me. I have hard copy of my papers but I do not know how to send them to you electronically.
